params.focusReason: control-frame calibration; LM focused to read her per-hit damage (neutral Water boss, all 4 units neutral, x1.10 element factored separately)

method: ffmpeg contact sheets (overview 1/6s; FB-window zoom fps=2-3; full frames @44-51s). Read from stills with the owner-confirmed colour convention.
notes: DoT-crit test — INCONCLUSIVE (attribution corrected by scripts/probe/hit-values.ts). Colour convention (owner-confirmed): white=normal, orange+crit-icon=crit, red 'CORE HIT'=core, bright GREEN=HEAL (green here = Helm's B3 life-leech team heal, over the CHARACTER not the crosshair — NOT LM damage, discarded). CORRECTION: LM's value bands per hit-values are SMG normal 14k-68k, DoT (253.4% modelled; in-game 63.36% x4 = ~156k-220k per sub-hit), barrage/big ~2.25M+. So the 64733 popups I first tagged 'dot' are actually her NORMAL band, and 82714 (orange) is a NORMAL crit (normals always crit — not the test). The real DoT sub-hits (~156-220k) sit in a CLEAN band (above ≤68k normals, below ≥2.25M barrage) but were not isolated in this read. 450314 (orange) is too large for a DoT crit (likely a normal core-crit or barrage). Net: LM DoT crit NOT confirmed here; ginmy dot_test remains the empirical basis. Re-read needed targeting the ~156-220k band. Cyan numbers = boss hits on the focus unit's Crown shield (not LM damage).

popups.note: ORANGE crit — but of a NORMAL (64733 x1.278), not the DoT
white; upper normal band / small overlap
ORANGE crit; too large for DoT — normal core-crit or barrage
